entry.title: Re: SAP CodeJam HANA ML In Switzerland 2024-03 Recap
entry.content:
Hey all, 

That was a great session. Although as a ABAP full stack dev, I participated to this event and took some notes. Actually ABAPer's are like half data analysts lol. Anyways, Thanks to @Vitaliy-R and them who asked questions in session.

entry.title: SNRO for number range
entry.content: Could a number range be copied from one system to another using SNRO?

entry.title: Re: Client's requirements is to calculate commissions in...
entry.content: I agree with all of your points. However, the client is quite inflexible, insisting that they must pay their agents immediately upon receiving credits for one of their commission campaigns, rather than waiting until the end of the day. Our team has tried to convince them otherwise, but they maintain that immediate payment is their core requirement. Is there any available link to SAP best practices or recommendations suggesting a minimum timeframe for payments, preferably at least a day, or indicating that instant or real-time payouts are not possible or feasible?

entry.title: Re: Notification for Expiration of Service Keys (Certificates) in Cloud Foundry via iFlows on SAP In
entry.content:
Hi,

I am getting https://login.eu20.hana.ondemand.com/oauth/token   please help me here.

Before its working now its not working.

 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Groovy EDI Segment Counter (also known as $B2B_SEG_COUNTER)
entry.content:
I hope this little suggestion will keep others from the frustration of the following...

1. It is important that you add this script step  BEFORE the content modifier step that you use to build out the ISA/SE/IEA segments.  If you do this after the CM step then you will find that any whitespace that you have in those segments will get removed.  The 

 

preserveWhitespace = true

doesn't work as expected.  So if you have this step after your CM step then you will never be able to have the required 10 characters in ISA02 / ISA04 if those are empty in your mapping which so often is the case.  It does allow you to keep any whitespace that you may have in ISA06 and ISA08 because those fields actually have content other than just the whitespace but ISA02 / ISA04 often only has the 10 characters of whitespace.

 

Hope this helps to keep others from pulling out their hair.

Enjoy,

Del

entry.title: Re: Preview on your device
entry.content: no function. sorry. i can help i don't ressarch

entry.title: Re: Consuming External API’s in ABAP Code Snippets
entry.content:
Hello,

What is the method to pass body in JSON format to the request?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Material status error not shown in Check Material Coverage app or MD01N when running MRP
entry.content: Hi, As I have observed, regardless of the S/4 version MRP live doesn’t prevent execution as in MD02 even it’s blocked for MRP (MRP message=B) . After execution it will display the materials with errors or warning so that the planner can take actions in the next planning run. After MRP run, have you checked whether the requirement can be met by the ‘materials with messages’ in transaction MD01N or ‘Display MRP Master Data Issues’ Fiori app (F1425A)?

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere View Persistency OOM, HANA Cloud do not release memory!!!
entry.content:
@XaviPoloand @albertosimeoni , 

Have you seen any limitation of using HANA cloud (underneath Datasphere) vs standalone HANA cloud? Considering the fact that HANA Cloud underneath Datasphere comes with Datasphere license and for standalone HANA cloud- there will be additional cost. Is there any use case that why one should be opting for standalone HANA cloud, if we already have Datasphere license and have enabled HANA cloud users in it.

Will appreciate your response.

entry.title: Re: NF-e Nota Técnica 2023.004 v1.10: novos campos adicionados à nota fiscal
entry.content:
Olá Boa tarde !

Por favor, saberiam dizer se o campo INDDEDUZDESON será adicionado na estrutura J_1BNFE_S_ITEM400 que é utilizada na Badi CL_NFE_PRINT ?

Agradeço.

entry.title: Re: Access SAP HANA Cloud Underneath of SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Have you seen any limitation of using HANA cloud (underneath Datasphere) vs standalone HANA cloud? Considering the fact that "HANA Cloud underneath Datasphere" comes as part Datasphere license vs for "standalone HANA cloud" - there will be additional cost. Is there any use case that why one should be opting for standalone HANA cloud, if we already have Datasphere license and have enabled HANA cloud users in it.

Will appreciate your response.

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud Import Connection to SAP SuccessFactor.
entry.content: Very nice guidance.

entry.title: Worker availabilty data cds view and block time sheet entries for non working days
entry.content:
Hi, do you know in which CDS the availability data is stored, e.g. if I create via the API an entry for an Worker for public holiday? I can successfully create an entry and I do see it in the manage my time sheet app a a grey block for the specific day. And would it be possible to block time sheet entries for non working days?

thanks in advance

Gabriel

entry.title: Re: Client's requirements is to calculate commissions in...
entry.content: I haven't seen anything suggesting a "minimum" timeframe but the way the system works suggests this. It's a batch processing system and you calculate by period. Perhaps this blog post may help? There maybe some API's that may allow for an "instant" calculation? https://community.sap.com/t5/human-capital-management-blogs-by-sap/sap-commissions-productitive-apis-for-quick-calculationservice/ba-p/13550494

entry.title: Re: NF-e Technical Note 2023.004 v1.10: New Fields Added to Nota Fiscal
entry.content:
Hello Luize Boyen,

We have implemented OSS notes as described, we are not able to see the tag <indDeduzDeson> in the XML. May you assist on how to add that? We are on ECC 6.0 SPS17

Thanks

entry.title: Re: NF-e Technical Note 2023.004 v1.10: New Fields Added to Nota Fiscal
entry.content:
Hello @nanda_pandit-champsi,

 

SAP still did not release the SAP Notes for the XML mapping probably that is the reason why you don't see the tags in the XML. In case you use a third party messaging system then you have to double check with them. Of course be sure the system is mapping correctly and sending the information to the messaging system.

Att,

 

Leonardo Brunetto

entry.title: Re: IT 2006 in SAP and SF EC Time Off Integration
entry.content:
Hi, 

in my case, I replicate it2001 and it2006 using his document:

https://community.sap.com/t5/human-capital-management-blogs-by-members/replicating-time-data-from-employee-central-to-ecp-an-overview/ba-p/13420940

Credits for Conefenel.

entry.title: Re: NF-e Technical Note 2023.004 v1.10: New Fields Added to Nota Fiscal
entry.content:
Thank you Leonardo. Do know when SAP is going to release the Notes with XML mapping?

Our NFe with Suframa are getting rejected in our QA system due to the missing indicator?

Is there any work around that you know of?

Thanks,

NPC

entry.title: Re: NF-e Technical Note 2023.004 v1.10: New Fields Added to Nota Fiscal
entry.content:
Hello @nanda_pandit-champsi ,

as far as I know it will be released end of the month. Yes, short in time to implement. But to have a better timeline maybe ask SAP.

The workaround will require a huge modification in the messaging system at least in my knowledge.

Att,

entry.title: Re: NF-e Technical Note 2023.004 v1.10: New Fields Added to Nota Fiscal
entry.content:
Thank you Leonardo. I appreciate you help.

Have a great day !

NPC

entry.title: Re: LPP – Último Preço de compra (Localização Brasil)
entry.content:
Ola Patrícia

No atual cenário de localização Brasil e aqui sendo mais específicos para revenda, temos ICMS, PIS, COFINS e IPI, nesse caso pelo que vi no programa standard da SAP não esta tratando os cálculos da exclusão do ICMS da base do PIS e COFINS e por consequência o valor liquido fica incorreto, outro ponto é com relação ao IPI, que deveria somar como custo para um recalculo do preço líquido e que o programa da SAP também não trata.

Mais um ponto importante que estou tratando de forma customizada agora é com relação a entradas que não possuem ICMS porém possuem PIS e COFINS, isso a tabela não é atualizada porem há uma exigência fiscal de termos o último preço de compra considerando que o preço líquido com PIS e COFINS muda.

Há outras entradas que não são realizadas via MIRO ou GRC e que não atualiza a tabela a qual a SAP tbm não dispõe de uma solução para busca de valores.

Por fim o programa standard ainda possui um problema quando as notas possuem IPI e isso precisa ser tratado.

A minha solução no momento foi desenvolvimentos na função J_1B_LPP_CHECK

Att

Maurício Ranzi

entry.title: Rise to the challenges of Harnessing the full potential of AI
entry.content:
It’s safe to say that AI is everywhere. It’s often a case of “the answers AI, what’s the question”?

As Paul Saunders, SAP’s Chief Evangelist for Cloud ERP explained in a recent podcast, “I am often asked, why should I take on AI? The answer is, well, you shouldn’t, you should grow your business. You should optimize your business. You should transform your business, and you are going to do that through AI”.

This underscores the necessity for businesses to thoroughly assess and comprehend various related aspects to craft a robust AI Business Strategy. The key is to identify your business challenges you need to address, the use cases that will improve your business, and then determine how best to address them. The possible applications for AI in the business context seem endless, but how do you turn this potential into tangible value? What scenarios will work best for your business? How do you build an AI strategy?  And how will AI align with your specific operational requirements?

These are the major discussion points in an upcoming webcast on April 30th  that Paul will be hosting called “Rise into the Future – Harness the full potential of Business AI” where experts from SAP and IDC
will discuss the tangible benefits that AI and Generative AI bring to businesses.

What is Business AI?

Business AI is the engine to run core processes, while the system adapts, adjusts, and uniquely optimizes for the company-specific circumstance. In this era of AI, processes are continuously learning and autonomously optimizing based on the real-time data in context of the business. And contextualized insights just a prompt away.

In order to meet this vision, Business AI needs to be relevant, reliable, and responsible:

  • Future-proofed with the most relevant AI experiences delivered in the context of the business solutions and with industry specificity.
  • Based on the unique business data with process context that delivers the most reliable business AI. Your AI is only as good as your data, and there is no room for errors or AI hallucinations when it comes to your most mission critical processes.
  • Responsible AI which has the highest levels of concern for security, privacy, compliance, and ethics. Ironically, the more responsibly AI is built and delivered, the freer an organization is to use it.

How do I harness the full potential of Business AI

To learn more about how to harness the full potential of Business AI click here to join the Rise into the Future – Harness the full potential of Business AI”.  

The panel will discuss AI and Generative AI in the context of Cloud ERP and will provide you with valuable insights and advice on:

  • The potential for AI and the future possibilities to drive innovation and growth.
  • The latest research-based insights into current AI market trends, challenges, and opportunities.
  • How to craft a robust AI business strategy.
  • The SAP Business AI strategy

entry.title: SEN. Context administration in the desktop assistant V2
entry.content:
Hi all, I need again your support.

I'm trying to understand best way to manage page key in desktop assistant.

Prerequisites

  1. SEN cloud
  2. Desktop assistant has been created with in app help object.
  3. In app help object has such page key:

<PageKey>
<MSAA/>
<SAP>
<PageAtt type="programm" value="SAPLMEGUI" langdep="0"/>
<PageAtt type="text" value="wnd[0]" langdep="0"/>
<PageAtt type="title" value="Местная закупка 7100000312: создание: ana AMANGOSHVILI" langdep="1"/>
<PageAtt type="transaction" value="ME23N" langdep="0"/>
<PageAtt type="type" value="GuiMainWindow" langdep="0"/>
</SAP>
</PageKey>

Task 

Neutralise order number. In app help should be available for any order.

Decision

I tried 2 scenario:

  1. Replace with the preset - Neutralise all values
  2. Replace with the reg extension 

For both scenario I've got the same page key

<PageKey>
<MSAA/>
<SAP>
<PageAtt type="programm" value="SAPLMEGUI" langdep="0"/>
<PageAtt type="text" value="wnd[0]" langdep="0"/>
<PageAtt type="title" value="RegExp(/.*/)" original="Местная закупка 7100000312: создание: ana AMANGOSHVILI" langdep="1"/>
<PageAtt type="transaction" value="ME23N" langdep="0"/>
<PageAtt type="type" value="GuiMainWindow" langdep="0"/>
</SAP>
</PageKey>

Result 

  1. For the 1st scenario it doesn't work. In app help available only for the order 7100000312
  2. For the 2nd scenario it works well. In app help available  for any order

Question

Why with the same page key different result?

entry.title: Can't Preview On Device in Community: No QR Code?! (CLASS TONIGHT :P)
entry.content:
Hi,

After signing in to my Buildapps Community account to review any updates, I discovered I can't find the right way to preview in the mobile app.

The mobile app seems to only want to use a QR code to connect to the community-based project preview BUT my preview doesn't seem to have QR code any more. Only the pin, which I think is for the 'full' version?

Help! I use BuildApps Community as my primary low code application dev tool for a graduate course. Love the tool! 🙂

 

Thanks,
Dave Gerding

entry.title: From Shipment to Container, Gain Logistics Visibility at a More Granular Level
entry.content:
Scientists use microscopes.  Birders use binoculars.  Being able to put-eyes-on-the-details is how practitioners are able to meet their objectives. 

So how do supply chain professionals get the logistics visibility they need to meet their objectives?  SAP’s latest enhancement to SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace now enables supply chain practitioners to put-eyes-on-the-details for improved granularity in global logistics visibility. 

There are three significant benefits to having highly granular logistics visibility, but let’s cover some background first. 

Delivered in the 2402 Release for SAP Business Network for Logistics, shippers and their transportation stakeholders now have the details they need to get an even more granular level of logistics visibility. 

The SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace solution now provides clear, easy to access detail on individual Tracking Units of a Shipment, Fright Order or Fright Booking.  A Tracking Unit represents the lowest level of physical goods tracked during transportation processes.  Examples of common Tracking Units are a box, a pallet, or a container. 

Shipments can contain a very large number of Tracking Units, which may travel different routes to their destination.  Now, in addition to tracking at the shipment level, the journey of Tracking Units can be individually visualized with event reporting. 

To gain logistics visibility at the Tracking Unit level, shippers and transportation stakeholders can drill-down from the 'Shipment Details' or 'Freight Unit Details' page into each Tracking Unit in a Freight Order, Freight Booking or Shipment, and then delve into the 'Tracking Unit Details' page to see:

  • Transportation route and events visualized on a scalable map in real-time
  • Detail on events, including:
    - Loading Start and End
    - Proof of Pick-up and Delivery
    - Departure and Arrival
  • Carrier reference documents
  • Tracking and execution statuses, both customizable and out-of-the-box
  • Higher level tracked objects, like:
    - Fright Order, Freight Booking, Shipment, Freight Unit
    - Outbound or Inbound Delivery
    - Even Sales Order, Purchase Order, or Stock Transport Order

So what does this type of highly detailed logistics visibility at the Tracking Unit level mean to a shipper and their stakeholders? 

There are three significant benefits in business context to such highly granular logistics visibility:

1) Better customer service through faster problem resolution

With detailed visibility into individual tracking units, you can provide more accurate and timely updates to customers regarding the status and location of your shipments. And when issues arise during transit, such as delays, damages, or lost shipments, you can pinpoint the exact location and status of affected units, to take immediate corrective actions, such as rerouting shipments or initiating investigations  This transparency serves to enhance customer satisfaction by reducing uncertainty, improving responsiveness, and enabling better communication, which goes a very long way when building customer loyalty.

2) Improved operational efficiency, including better inventory management

Logistics visibility at the Tracking Unit level allows companies to optimize their transportation and distribution processes by identifying inefficiencies, streamlining routes, consolidating shipments, to minimize delays, improve resource utilization, and drive cost savings.  Such detailed logistics visibility even enables more precise inventory management. You can monitor the movement of goods in real-time, accurately and with sufficiently granularity to forecast inventory levels to avoid stockouts and unplanned long lead times... or excess inventory and spoilage on the other end of the scale.

3) Enhanced risk mitigation through data-driven decision making

Analyzing routes, events and statuses at the Tracking Unit level alone can provide valuable insights into supply chain operations.  But combine such detailed insights with the higher-level business context of a Sales Order, Purchase Order, or Stock Transfer, natively integrated into your ERP… and trend overall performance, risk, and sustainability with the SAP Business Network, intelligent insights add-on solution… and supply chain executives will have their required foundation for key strategic decisions, such as supplier sourcing, route optimization, and inventory allocation, leading to improved business performance and competitiveness from a more resilient supply chain.

See the details of Tracking Units in SAP Business Network Global Tack and Trace. 

Learn more about all of the SAP Business Network for Logistics solutions.   

Read more about how Cloud-based Visibility Equips Trading Partners to Counter Tomorrow’s Supply Chain Disruption Today from Joern Keller, Executive Vice President and Chief Product Officer, SAP Business Network. 

The take-away: Driving for this level of logistics visibility is the next level of value-add that supply chain resources bring to the overall success and competitiveness of their business.

entry.title: Re: SAP Build process automation live content - maintaini...
entry.content: I managed to fugure this out few days back. Also, playing too much with these business rules abt deleting versions and creating new ones are giving strange responses.

entry.title: Re: Purpose of valuation class
entry.content: A valuation class is an attribute that can be assigned to a material in a specific plant. This makes it possible to group together materials from a financial point of view. That attribute code is the link to the FI accounting. Every time there is a material movement, the accounting entries of that movement are derived from the accounting engine based on the valuation class of the material.

entry.title: S/4HANA readiness check: check failure
entry.content:
Hey there!

we are facing the following issue when executing the ATC checks for S/4HANA readiness:

 

 

 

Object not checkable, due to inconsistent configuration: 		(3 Check Failures) 																																																																									
Check failures: 		(3 Check Failures) 																																																																																																																		
Object Name:RSNAST00  	 Object Type: PROG
The SAP-owned namespace /0SJ1G/ is in scope. SAP objects cannot be checked in this case.
Object Name:V60A  	 Object Type: FUGR
The SAP-owned namespace /0SJ1G/ is in scope. SAP objects cannot be checked in this case.
Object Name:V61B  	 Object Type: FUGR
The SAP-owned namespace /0SJ1G/ is in scope. SAP objects cannot be checked in this case.

 

At least the 1st failure come from an enhancement.

We have not figured out where the other two check failures come from.

Additionally the mentioned namespace /0SJ1G/ seems weird, because none of the objects belong to this namespace.

The reason why we cannot ignore these check failures is, that it prevents us from selecting the check run with "Analyze result in ATC problems view". If we do, no findings will be displayed.

From our point of view there are not SAP-notes that fit to the problem.

System information:

SAP_BASIS 758
SAP_ABA 75I

Does anyone have a clue, what we could check?

The system says: the SAP-owned namespace is in scope. But how can this namespace be in scope if we explicitely select a different package in the check run and mark "Include Objects from checkable namespaces"?

 

Thanks for any hint!

entry.title: Best (Teaching Low Code) Path Forward?
entry.content:
Hi BuildApps Community,

I'm an associate professor in Chicago that has been delighted to use AppGyver and now BuildApps to teach rapid, low code app development. Does it make sense to keep using BuildApps?

The tool is great, but I can't get my students onboarded in free trial in way that's reliable enough to move to the "full" version of BuildApps. Is moving to the full version of BuildApps the best way to move ahead? Or is it time to find a new low code tool 😞

(Right now, I'm just trying to find the fastest way to get "Preview On Device" working in Community since I can't find the QR Code, which is why I was wondering if we are being "urged by progress" to abandon Community version?)

All help and ideas appreciated.

Thanks,

Dave Gerding

entry.title: Re: Creating multiple PM Malfunction Reports at once
entry.content: You can use Reference Field in Notification Creation Screen... Else, you can contact your developer to create a program and tcode for creating Notification.

entry.title: Re: SAP US Benefits ACA 1095-C PDF form on ESS
entry.content: This would be really beneficial to have this form on ESS instead of printing, stuffing envelops and mailing.

entry.title: One CC to more than one S4
entry.content:
Hi fellows!

We are facing a Landscape having S4 (DEV, QAS, PRD) and CC (QAS, PRD).
At the Customer Management Area, we can create more the 1 connection, and we also saw that de Customer Managment Area is informed at the Subscriber Account.
We are understanding we can use the same CC QAS to work with S4 DEV and S4 QAS. Is it correct?

In case of Yes, is it necessary for SOM sends an adicional information to drive for the correct Area, or the connection solve this it self?

Is there any Parameter that must to be setted to allow it?

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Can't Preview On Device in Community: No QR Code?! (CLASS TONIGHT :P)
entry.content: Simply change the tool on your mobile to SAP Build App... Unfortunately the CATASTROPHE is that you have to constantly reconnect, the session only lasts a few minutes, it's no longer possible to leave with your app to do a demo.

entry.title: Error received when exporting report to pdf using vb.net
entry.content:
This is the error I receive as shown below.

 

 

Here is the code used.  The report runs fine in the CR viewer, but when I try to export it to a PDF file then I receive the above error.

 

 

 ' Run report
 Try
     CrystalReportViewer1.ReportSource = objReport
     CrystalReportViewer1.Zoom(100)
 Catch SqlExceptionErr As SqlException
     MessageBox.Show(SqlExceptionErr.Message)
 End Try  

' Export report to pdf
  Try
      objReport.ExportToDisk(ExportFormatType.PortableDocFormat, "c:temp\100000026")

   Catch ex As Exception
      MsgBox(ex.ToString)
  End Try

entry.title: Re: Column Hide in Public Dimension
entry.content:
@mahioct 

Show /hide column is just for better navigation when you have large number of attributes. Showing or Hiding column does not have any effect on access or its availability in stories or any external consumption.

 

Nikhil

entry.title: S/4HANA Readiness check: Analyze aborted in CL_CI_TEST_NO_ORDER_BY
entry.content:
Hey! 

We get the following error on many objects:

Analyze aborted from check CL_CI_TEST_NO_ORDER_BY

If we have a look at the mentioned development object it seems to have nothing to do with the check itself.

like: 

 

 

  METHOD log.
    DATA: text_tab TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF string.

    IF log_message-key IS NOT INITIAL.
      appl_log->add_free_text_info( log_message-key ).
    ENDIF.

    IF strlen( log_message-value ) > 200.
      CALL FUNCTION 'SOTR_SERV_STRING_TO_TABLE'
        EXPORTING
          flag_no_line_breaks = 'X'
          line_length         = 200
          text                = log_message-value
        TABLES
          text_tab            = text_tab.
    ELSE.
      APPEND log_message-value TO text_tab.
    ENDIF.

    LOOP AT text_tab INTO DATA(line).
      appl_log->add_free_text_info( line ).
    ENDLOOP.
  ENDMETHOD.

 

 

So in my opinion it looks like the check had some errors and reports "analyze aborted".

There is no SAP-note the is relevant for our system:

SAP_BASIS 758
SAP_ABA 75I

Any idea what to check?

Thanks
 ~Enno

entry.title: CURTO1009 You are not authorized for class type 400
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to transfer/create PDS from S4 to ePPDS using CURTOADV_CREATE. However, I keep getting the error "You are not authorized for class type 400" CURTO1009. I am using Material Class (001) and a couple of material characteristic. But not using class 023 or 300. 

I even tried a material without classification view but that fails too.

PP Master data is setup correctly. PV consistency check is successful.

We are using Embedded PPDS in S/4 HANA.

Any help is appreciated. Am I missing any config setup or anything else?

Thanks.

  • SAP Build Apps (Create a login pin...)
  • SAP AppGyver and Community Edition (Scan QR Code)

But I don't have a code to scan. Or should I be doing something different on the the app side?

Thanks.

Dave

entry.title: Re: Can't Preview On Device in Community: No QR Code?! (CLASS TONIGHT :P)

entry.title: How do I display group headings and totals for table in Adobe (Livecycle) forms
entry.content:
Hi folks, I am interested if anyone has found a way to display group headings and totals for a table in Adobe forms in the following way.

I've not been able to find anything other than blogs showing how to put the group headings in columns on the same row as the detail line.  i.e, as follows.

This is not great as the additional two columns make the data too wide to fit on a single line nicely.

Wondering if anyone can recommend a blog that shows how to do option 1 in detail.

entry.title: Re: How to consume a remote service with ETag (Precondition required)?
entry.content: +1 Yep, Looking for the same in CAP - Java

entry.title: Re: Missing purpose string in Info.plist
entry.content:
@MaiaraEllwanger this problem seems to be critical for a number of Builders, but I see no acknowledgement from any developer that the problem is being reviewed.  Are we all posting in the right place?

We are all getting the error from Apple:

Please correct the following issues and upload a new binary to App Store Connect.

ITMS-90683: Missing purpose string in Info.plist - Your app’s code references one or more APIs that access sensitive user data, or the app has one or more entitlements that permit such access. The Info.plist file for the “RNVApp.app” bundle should contain a NSSiriUsageDescription key with a user-facing purpose string explaining clearly and completely why your app needs the data. If you’re using external libraries or SDKs, they may reference APIs that require a purpose string. While your app might not use these APIs, a purpose string is still required. For details, visit: https://developer.apple.com/documentation/uikit/protecting_the_user_s_privacy/requesting_access_to_protected_resources.

entry.title: How do I restore the Minimise/Maximise window for Adobe Forms Layout editor?
entry.content:
Following a recent upgrade of our SAP system, the Adobe Forms layout editor lost the ability to maximise and minimise the layout editor window.

Has anyone else had this problem and how is it fixed?

The options are missing and greyed out, as shown below.

entry.title: Re: But where do I use this variable?
entry.content:
I haven't yet come across a way to annotate or comment on logic added within the logic canvas so perhaps somebody else has an ideal answer to this question or perhaps I haven't understood it correctly. 

However to answer your second question: There are a few ways to tell if a page or app variable has been used. If a variable is assigned to a property or layout, The first indication on weather or not its a page or app variable is the icon. 

Page variables have an icon that resembles a 'paper' or 'file' with a chain link protruding from the middle heading outwards to the right. Additionally hovering above a property that is assigned to the variable will also highlight what the property is bound to. So in the screenshot to the right of this text, the variable is currently bound to a page variable

 

App variables have an icon that appears to be resembling the screen of a mobile device combined with a chain link as in the screenshot to the right. Additionally hovering above a property that is bound to a variable will also indicate weather or not its an app or page variable 

 

Lastly if you select a property that is bound to a variable and switch it to binding type: formula, You can identify a key difference which is that app variables will always start with appVars.example while page variables will be labeled as pageVars.example within the formula binding type. To clear any doubts over any variable you have, you could simply type the name of the variable in formula binding and see if it begins with appVars or pageVars. Below are some examples of an app variable named DeviceToken

 

 and page variable named DailyTemp within formula binding  

Hopefully this answers your second question and all the best with your project!

entry.title: Re: Charting on Print-Time Formulas or shared variables a...
entry.content: the link showed up, thank you.

entry.title: Variant Configuration Simple Method Step by Step
entry.content:
Intro.

Hope every body is aware about the Variant configuration with different methods. (class item in BOM, class characters assigned to the header and child materials)

But here I am sharing my insights about the the variant configuration without class characters assignment to child materials.

Master Data Prerequisites.

1. Characteristics CT04

2. Class CL02

3. Materials and its components MM01 

4. Super BOM and Super Routing CS01/CA01

5. Object Dependencies CU01

6. Configuration Profile for top level material CU41

Note : To check the configuration use CU50

Master data structure.

Let me explain the scenario with one example.

I have a finished material Boxer, in which I have different variants (Premium, Red and Black Boxer).

For making it I am using cloth, thread, and others as components. Below is the drilldown of my product structure (tcode - CS11).

I am using the special procurement types 50 - Phantom Assembly , 52 - Direct production. Use the Hyperlink to know more.

I took reference from online retail app where we will have this below option to choose/Order our desired product.

Like wise here in sap we can have the options to choose our variants before starting the production or creating the sales order if we configure it accordingly.

Output in SAP.

Here is the output of production orders, if I choose the characteristic Red color.

Main Part
Master data.

At first I created the materials as shown above in CS11 screen.

Description of materials will give you clear idea about the material.

For example CLOTH THREAD - Configurable 50 - Phantom. i.e. this material is configurable and has special procurement type 50 in MRP 2 view.

Make the material as configurable (which have variants) by creating the material with material type KMAT or using the check box configurable in basic data 2 view of material. 

Make the material as phantom by assigning the special procurement type 50 to MRP2 view of material master

Class and class characteristics

Created class and characteristics. I created only one class and assigned all the characters to same class which are all required for the whole BOM from top to bottom. Not required to create & assign multiple class characteristics to respective sub components, if you are not having materials with 72 strategy type.

CL02 - Created Class

CT04 - Created characteristics with values and assigned all of it to one class.

Then created the super BOM, super Routing and production version.

Super BOM (CS01). Its normal BOM, but will have all variant materials components assigned to a single header material. Here based on the OD/character selection the item will be considered / exploded for production.

In CLOTH COLOR - I have added all the possible materials combination that are needed (cloth red, cloth black). Here all materials will not be required all the time, but either one of the materials will be chosen based on the character selection from the header level material BOXER. 

Similarly SUPER ROUTING also.

Single variant material will have the combination of operations necessary for all variant and will be chosen based on the OD.

Production version is straight forward i.e. one per material, as we have single Super BOM and Routing 

object dependencies created - CU01 

Click on Dependency editor to write the code.

To know more about the type of object dependencies use this Link.

Note: Selection conditions can be assigned to BOM, Routing & Config Profile. Preconditions can be assigned to Characteristics/ config Profile & not to BOM & Routing.

Assigned the OD to the BOM items and Operation items.

NOTE: If you are creating the BOM for configurable material you will have additional class tab.

I have assigned the Object dependencies to respective Components in BOM.

I am using CLOTH COLOR as phantom assembly. Inside that I have CLOTH RED & BLACK. For choosing the components I am assigning both OD to CLOTH COLOR and respective OD to components.

Below are the object dependencies assigned to the BOM components.

CLOTH COLOR, CLOTH RED          - $ROOT.TC_4589_00_8120300 = '0010'. (Red)

                                                          Syntax. Characteristic name = 'Characteristic Value'.

Logic: I assigned the OD 'red' to BOM item CLOTH RED to consider this item for explosion, if I choose the characteristics value '0010' from config profile while creating Sales / production order.

CLOTH COLOR, CLOTH BLACK     - $ROOT.TC_4589_00_8120300 = '0020'. (Black)

PREMIUM FABRIC                         - $ROOT.TC_4589_00_8120300 = '0030'. (Premium)

At material CLOTH level the component CLOTH COLOR will be selected, even If I select any one of the characteristic value 'red / black'.

Also at the same time the component FABRIC PREMIUM will only be selected if I choose the characteristic value 'premium'.

But at CLOTH COLOR level only one Component (CLOTH RED or CLOTH BLACK) will be selected based up on characteristic value.

Similarly created/assigned OD to routing.

Configuration Profile - CU41

We have to assign the Class with all characteristic to our top level BOM Header material. It will pass on the characters to the bottom level of the BOM to choose the components based on the OD maintained in BOM.

Assigned the class only to top level header material via Config profile.

Now create one profile inside it, assign the class type and assign the class.

Double click on the Profile name to assign the class and OD like procedures and preconditions.

Some time on choosing the respective characters we need to choose respective operations. So in such case we can assign the procedures in configuration profile itself. Also pricing procedures can be assigned via this procedures.

Saved the config profile at last.

Now we can check the configuration via CU50. 

Scenario 1: Red Boxer

Using the material and clicking the configuration button.

Here I am choosing the character 'red' and chosen the tab Others.

Here the first character is already chosen based on the procedure which I have assigned in config profile and its for choosing the operations.

Here you can see that the CLOTH COLOR is exploded from material CLOTH levels and CLOTH RED is exploded from material CLOTH COLOR level. At the same time the material FABRIC PREMIUM is not selected.

Scenario 2: Premium one

Here you can see that the FABRIC PREMIUM is selected but the CLOTH COLOR is not selected.

Grouping of characteristics can be done by using the field Interface design in CU41 configuration profile.

Mostly Sales order costing is used in such type of industry.

Conclusion: Here the thing is that the class T_MAIN_BOXER contains all the characters required to choose the components till the lowest BOM level is only assigned to configurable header material via configuration profile.

We have assigned the class only at Top level BOM material via the config profile. But it will explode the components till the lowest BOM level based on the characteristics value which we have given while creating the sale/production order. Its not required to assign the class to materials at each BOM level.

entry.title: Re: What's your tip for using SAP Build Apps?
entry.content: Thanks @mihaly-toth-nc ! I actually hadn't come across these nodes yet but after trying them, they're pretty handy and practical 🙂

entry.title: Fiori elements app shows wrong decimal separators
entry.content:
Dear Crowd,

I have created a Fiori Elements List application which seems to work quite fine, including annotations, virtual elements etc.; all working more or less according to my expectations. But, I am fighting so much with the only quantity field; I am not able to display the field with correct decimal separators:

in the CDS View, I am selecting a type QUAN field

My user setting for number format is 12.345,000. Changing it to 12,345.00 results in a slightly better result:

The content of the ODATA request looks correct:
     "CargoWeight":"20183.000"

If I switch to "EDIT" mode, the unit of measure disappears, and the numbers are displayed correctly.

The SAP UI version is 1.108.22. Same behaviour in different browsers, also in the service preview started from Eclipse. I played around for hours already, I don't have any idea how to get rid of that. 

Is there anything I missed? I'm happy for any hint you can give.

regards, Karl

entry.title: Multiple System Status' but usually 4 are displayed
entry.content: If there are multiple System Status', say for an Insp. Lot(QA03),  how does the system determine which status'  to display(as a short text). There's not enough room on the System status line for all to be displayed so what's the logic for what does get displayed?

entry.title: Re: No mapping is defined for the types "IMPORT" and "TAB...
entry.content:
Hi, 

I don't know if the question is still valid, but I had the same problem. Solution turned out to be simple: my mappings were put in wrong behavior (in C_* i.e. projection instead of R_* - definition). Maybe this hint will spare someone few moments. 

MG

entry.title: Re: March Developer Challenge - CloudEvents: Week 1
entry.content:
My submission for week 1.

{
    "type": "my.bank.account.balanceChanged",
    "specversion": "1.0",
    "source": "/my/bank/account",
    "id": "f47452b4-9bc5-4b8c-b3a6-fe1cc2a3c6ff",
    "time": "2024-03-19T09:00:00Z",
    "datacontenttype": "application/json",
    "data": {
        "account": "12345678"
    }
}

entry.title: Re: condition type FOR VENDOR
entry.content:
Hi, 

If you want the condition to be % based and then amend the value, you may amend the value directly in the value field - system will allow it even if condition is % based calculation type.

If you want the condition itself to be fixed value (not % based), you may change the calculation type to B as Bijay already suggested.

Regards,

entry.title: Re: 🇨🇭 Getting Started with Machine Learning using SAP HANA (Zurich, CH)
entry.content: Dziękuję @Kris-K

entry.title: Re: But where do I use this variable?
entry.content:
Hey there, All pretty amazing suggestions above!

I would also like to add my few thoughts on this.

First suggestion that saves me enourmous amounts of time is to acutally use the browsers built in text search, so use the 'ctrl+F' or 'cmd+F' keyboard combination. Then search for the specific variable, component name or similar. This is why the change (that happened a few months ago) that renaming components is pretty easy helped a lot. This method works pretty well, if you need to find styles (and you happen to have many) or if you are in the variable settings screen. 

As for how to document. I tend to just use a 'javascript' custom node which doesn't have an output and the content of it is a comment. I then name it either 'comment' or with some more descriptive name. This way you could in fact position your comments pretty close to where the actual logic happens. See image below: 

 

And then on the inside I have something like this: 

Hope this also gives some useful suggestions.

Best wishes

entry.title: Commercial Paper Partial Termination
entry.content:
We are using commercial paper (Product Type “53A”) to handle our requirements for purchasing and processing the treasury bills and it fully meets our requirements; but in some cases, our accounting and investment department decides to sell fully or partially the transaction before the maturity or end date.

In case of selling it in full, we are using the “Give Notice/Terminate” transaction and it fully meets our requirements; but in case of partial selling we couldn’t find any available transaction that meets our requirements as the only available solution is to create a new transaction with the same product type “53A” and transaction type “200 Commercial paper-Sale (Fair Value)” which is not accepted by the accounting department as the actual cash flow, finally repayment, interest and its accrual will be the reconciliation of postings generated from two different transactions.

Therefore, we need your advice in this regard.

entry.title: Re: New Field in ACDOCU | SAP Group Reporting
entry.content:
You are talking about posting quantity against posting level 20, 30 etc as far as I understand. Please refer to note 

https://me.sap.com/notes/3398433.

entry.title: How to exclude users from IPS sync
entry.content: I have a user that I need to exclude from the IPS sync to IAS. Can anyone help point me in the direction on how to do this using source transformations? I have a user which is continually set to inactive, even though they are not inactive. SAP recommended that I purge the user out of SF and rehire them, which really isn't an option. How do I prevent IPS from reading this user when running the IAS sync? I should say that I was hoping for a solution that allowed me to add users to a SF group to be excluded, so that I didn't need to udpate the transformations each time this happens

entry.title: Re: Onboarding2.0System throwing an error while employee is accessing Onboarding tasks like welcome
entry.content: We are having the same issue. User could see it while they were still an onboardee but as of their first day being active in EC, the system is throwing an error. Thought it was a permission item as per KBA https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/3244443 but that did not resolve the issue. Meetings are also not displaying under the onboarding journey

entry.title: Run Automatic Payment F110: Automatic Cash discount account determination - error determination SKE
entry.content:
Hi experts, 

I´m facing issue running automatic payment to vendor for open item with applicable cash discount.

Message No. FZ310 In table T030, the entry "Co.Code" SKE  is missing

I already have maintained table T030 as below, but SAP still triggering same error below.

MANDTKTOPLKTOSLBWMODKOMOKBKLASKONTSKONTH
111C.CodeSKE I0 394001394001

Additionally, I also have tested changes in G/L Account Master Date in fields Tax Category and Posting without tax allowed flagging, but nothing is working.

Any ideias what should be incorrect?

entry.title: Re: But where do I use this variable?
entry.content: thank you but in fact the problem is rather in the other direction, when I have dozens of variables in the page variable list for example, the idea and to know if they are used and in what logic.

entry.title: Re: But where do I use this variable?
entry.content: Great idea for js blocks to write text in 🙂

entry.title: Re: March Developer Challenge - CloudEvents: Week 2
entry.content:
I used JavaScript SDK:

const { HTTP, CloudEvent } = require("cloudevents");

const ce = new CloudEvent({
    type: "my.bank.account.balanceChange",
    source: "/my/bank/account",
    datacontenttype: "application/json",
    data: {
        "account": "12345678"
    }
});
const message = HTTP.binary(ce);
console.log(message);

Output:

entry.title: Re: Message =Data loss occurred when converting 202449000...
entry.content:
Hi @Ashish_Talekar,

Thank you for reaching out.

As mentioned in this post, please create a ticket for component CA-SIT-ENG.

We'll need to investigate the issue further.

Kind regards,
Ana

entry.title: Re: Tip: How To Execute C# or VB.NET Seamlessly in ABAP
entry.content:
Hi Stefan

Great work!

the link https://www.stschnell.de/dotnetrunner.com.zip  to download DLL library doesn't works

could you share again the library, please? 

Regards!

entry.title: Re: Solr index cronjob not getting triggered in commerce...
entry.content:
You need to provide more info regarding the issue you are facing. Here are some points that can help you troubleshoot.

  • Kindly check if cronjobs are configured on a particular node or node group. 
  • Can you restart the server running the cronjob? Sometimes old job is not complete, so you wont be able to create new job. You can check the status of old cronjob from backoffice and running cronjobs from hac.
  • Do you see any error in the logs when you manually trigger the cronjob? 
  • You can also check if the cronjob is active.

entry.title: Re: iOS build error with the new and the old version AppGyver.
entry.content:
I too am having persistent problems building web on March 18, 2024:

Runtime version: 4.9.201; AB version: 2.1.13COMMAND:
NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=12240 NEXT_SUPPORT_RELATIVE_PATHS=true  npxrnv export -p web -s standalone -c standalone --ci --yes --skipRnvCheck --packageManager yarn --template @sapappgyver/orchestra-template-standalone@4.9.201 -r
FAILED with ERROR:
Command failed with exit code 1: npx rnv export -p web -s standalone -c standalone --ci --yes --skipRnvCheck --packageManager yarn --template @sapappgyver/orchestra-template-standalone@4.9.201 -r

 I have not been able to build for over a week now.  Would you have any suggestions? AP 91079

thanks, Nick

entry.title: Re: But where do I use this variable?
entry.content:
Well for this I have not yet found a proper solution. There is one workaround, but that still won't help you find the variable in the UI. What I do sometimes is copy the page (or just an element) and paste it into an empty component.json file inside visual studio code. It will show you something like this: 

Inside here you can easily use the ctrl+F again, to find a specific pagevariable. This method doesn't really help if you also need to identify where it is as you would be lost in thousands of lines of json on a more complicated page. So I would only use this if you want to check if there is any use of a variable before deleting it. 

Of course this copying of an element allows things like this happen: 
Mevi's selectable calendar component

entry.title: SAP Cloud Integration B2B Sender Process Direct
entry.content:
Hi,
I am trying to initiate Cloud Integration - B2B scenario using sender Process Direct Adapter. But interface is failing at Step 1 b - PD Lookup - Communication Sender.

Below are the header values I have mentioned in postman -

SAP_EDI_Document_Standard = SAP_S4HANA_Cloud_SOA

SAP_COM_SND_Adapter_Type = Process_Direct

TPM B2B Scenario created with sender communication as Process Direct -

Error :- 

Step 1b IFlow Error :-

I have checked my MIG ang MAP, able to simulate from the SCI payload successfully.

If I change sender adapter from Process Direct to SOAP interface is running successfully.

What step am I missing to execute it using sender process direct?

BR,

Rashmi

 

Tagging Gurus - @gunther_stuhec , @mluptak

entry.title: Re: Solr index cronjob not getting triggered in commerce...
entry.content:
To address this issue, I recommend referring to our KBA titled "How to troubleshoot issues where Business Processes and scheduled CronJobs are not triggered." This KBA contains detailed information and step-by-step guidance on troubleshooting such issues.
You can access the KBA through the following link: 3151717 - How to troubleshoot issues where Business Processes and scheduled CronJobs are not triggered

entry.title: Re: how to remove authentication and access a fiori app a...
entry.content:
Xs-app.json of the html5 app repo:

{
    "welcomeFile": "/index.html",
    "authenticationMethod": "none",
    "routes": [
      {
        "authenticationType": "none",
        "csrfProtection": false,
        "source": "^/catalog/",
        "destination": "btp-api"
      },
      {
        "source": "^/resources/(.*)$",
        "target": "/resources/$1",
        "authenticationType": "none",
        "destination": "ui5"
      },
      {
        "source": "^/test-resources/(.*)$",
        "target": "/test-resources/$1",
        "authenticationType": "none",
        "destination": "ui5"
      },
      {
        "source": "^(.*)$",
        "target": "$1",
        "service": "html5-apps-repo-rt",
        "authenticationType": "none"
      }
    ]
  }

xs-app.json of the approuter:

{
    "authenticationMethod": "none",
    "routes": [],
    "welcomeFile": "/recapcapadvancedprogrammingmodelbtpservices"
  }

entry.title: Re: Missing purpose string in Info.plist
entry.content: (PT-BR) Passei o dia de hoje 18/03 tentando resolver este problema nada resolve, houve alguma mudança no compilador recente que esta gerando esta falha, @Sap precisamos de auxilio, é urgente por favor.

entry.title: Automating SAP BTP Cloud Connector Setup With Yeoman Generator
entry.content:
In this blog post, we're going to explore an exciting tool - an automated Yeoman generator for setting up the SAP BTP Cloud Connector. This generator, available on [GitHub], simplifies the process of connecting to an SAP BTP Subaccount in the Cloud Connector, adding necessary System Mappings, generating import files for SAP BTP Destinations, and accessing XS Advanced Systems in SAP Business Application Studio (BAS).

I would recommend you reading this blog to get a deep understanding of this setup

Before diving into the setup process, ensure that you have the following requirements in place:

  1. git client is available on your machine
  2. Node.js v18.14.2
  3. Yeoman - If not installed, you can install it using command: npm install -g yo
  4. XS Advanced CLI client (Download from SAP Software Store)
  5. Access to SAP Cloud Connector
  6. Make sure you're logged into your XS advanced account and the target space is SAP. You can use command to setting the "SAP" space:  xs target -s SAP
  7. You've access to SAP BTP Subaccount and necessary privileges

Getting Started

Clone the git repository

To get started with the generator, you first need to build and install it using npm. In your terminal, run the following command: npm install && npm link

This command installs the necessary dependencies and links the generator for local use.

Running the Generator

Navigate to the directory where you want to generate your project and kickstart the generator using the following command: yo bas-xsa-connectivity

The generator will prompt you for some crucial information, including:

1. Cloud Connector Login Url
2. Cloud Connector Username
3. Cloud Connector Password
4. Cloud Connector Location ID
5. SAP BTP Subaccount Region
6. SAP BTP Subaccount ID
7. Directory for Destination Files

After entering the required information, the generator will start performing tasks such as adding necessary System Mappings and resources, generating files for import in SAP BTP Destinations.

Once the generator completes its tasks, you will find your new files in the directory you specified. These files can be imported in your BTP Subaccount under the Connectivity > Destinations tab.

Support

For any issues or questions, you can raise an issue on the [GitHub repository]. The community is always ready to help!

entry.title: Re: Smartedit Overlay is not displayed correctly / stylin...
entry.content:
Hey there!

As per a Knowledge Article that is yet not shared, this unwanted behavior can be fixed by copying webApplicationInjector.js file from the latest patch release of SAP Commerce Cloud and replace the one in your application's asset folder: By default webApplicationInjector.js script is copied to assets folder from node_modules directory therefore to avoid file being replaced during build back to previous version might consider commenting out following part of code in angular.json of your JS application.

  • {
    "glob": "**/*",
    "input": "./node_modules/@spartacus/smartedit/assets",
    "output": "assets/"
    }

Kind regards,
Wesley
SAP Commerce Cloud Product Support - Brasil

entry.title: Re: SAPUI5: create custom library to use across different...
entry.content:
Here I have an example of two UI5 apps/components where one is consuming the other one as two different mta apps: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/connecting-ui5-typescript-components-locally/ba-p/13577527

You can use the same logic for libraries as components to connect them even as one or two mta's, the config to connect will be similar. 

Same for the deployed version, the namespace of the library will be resolved by workzone. If you don't use workzone, you'll need to configure the resource roots correctly.

 

Hope this helps! Kr, Wouter

entry.title: Compare attribute to date
entry.content:
Hi

I am trying to create a data action that get a calculation result if the year is the same as the year mention in certain dimension attribute (property) 

what is the script i need to use?

i tried his one but have an error

 

IF YEAR([d/LegalDoc].[p/DateStart]) = [d/Date].[p/YEAR] THEN
DATA([d/Measures]="Changes")=3
ENDIF

entry.title: Re: To Bifurcate the values present in a column based on...
entry.content:
You have to split every part of your tax-string1 and tax-string2 into separate elements, with substr(), pos(), lenght()
(e.g. with variables like this: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/need-to-split-string/qaq-p/9344510) 

... so it will be easy to compare/calculate every element of string1 and string2

entry.title: Re: Export and import ATC objects across on-premise and cloud ABAP systems
entry.content:
Hello Olga, wonderful blog. Thank you.

We are going from central ATC system(on-prem) to ATC on BTP. We like the ATC from code pal and we were able to pull it in. It works fine. Using the details you have given above we could export and import on-prem ATC to Git and into BTP. 

Question - How do we merge the ATC check from code pal and on-prem together and create one ATC variant which would have the clean code checks from code pal and our custom on-prem variant so we do not loose our customization? Thank you in advance 🙂

entry.title: Re: Can I create a SCORM Book in Enable Now that sends co...
entry.content:
Hi Ankur,

The other option that may be worth considering is to use Book objects to create the sub sections of the course.  If you do that, you can then mark individual sections as not being relevant for tracking so just focus on the content in the sections of the Book that are being tracked.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Update Exchange rate in a posted Journal Entry
entry.content:
Hi Community

Recently we had an issue where the exchange rates didn't automatically get imported, and some journal entries were posted using the incorrect exchange rates.

Is there a way to update the exchange rates on those posted journal entries without reversing and re-posting them?

For additional information we are using S/4 Hana Cloud Private Edition version 2021.

Thanks in advance for your help

Nathan

entry.title: Re: When i execute the report MCI5,MCI7 and MCI8 it shows...
entry.content: If you are on S/4 these reporting tables have been disabled.

entry.title: Re: SEN. Context administration in the desktop assistant V2
entry.content:
Hi,

The two page keys are not the same; the second one has been neutralized to remove the reference to a specific Order Number.  The highlighted part of the following image is the difference.  The Regular Expression that has been created by neutralizing the Order Number has removed the need for a specific Order Number, effectively any number is considered to be fine.

 

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: Adding a Text field to an ABAP CDS View via extension.
entry.content:
extend view C_ConsumerView with ZC_CONSUMER
  association [0..*] to I_MaterialText as _MaterialText on  $projection.Material3  = _MaterialText.Material

{
 
  _MaterialText
}

 

create another metadata extension view to extend the annotation.

entry.title: Re: Fiserv has a need for pulling users information from...
entry.content: Can you confirm if using auditing database won't invalidate the support license per indication in KBA 2793147?

entry.title: Neoris Mexico ha recibido su Golden Certificate
entry.content:
El Golden certificate es un logro que demuestra la constancia y el compromiso con las buenas practicas en la operación del portafolio de productos y servicios de SAP de nuestros partners con nuestros clientes.  Para el programa de SAP Certification for Outsourcing Partners es un gusto otorgar este reconocimiento a los partner que se han comprometido con la certificación por mas de 20 años y por ello quisimos abrir este espacio para que Neoris nos comparta su experiencia.

Primero, gracias por aceptar nuestra invitación a hablar acerca de lo que ha sido su experiencia como socio del programa SAP Certification for Outsourcing Partners.

Por favor, cuéntenos acerca de su compañía y de los principales servicios que ofrece. 

NEORIS es un Acelerador Digital y Socio Tecnológico de algunas de las compañías más grandes del mundo. Hemos trabajado en Consultoría Tecnológica por más de 20 años en todos los continentes. Hemos completado más de 1200 proyectos de gran escala y nos enorgullecemos de trabajar para más de 350 clientes en todo el mundo. Proveemos un servicio de alta calidad con nuestras 27 oficinas, Delivery Centers y Laboratorios de Innovación, donde trabajan algunas de las mejores mentes de la industria para generar el futuro de los negocios. Aspiramos a cambiar la forma en que las compañías estructuran su misión en un Mundo Digital. Creemos en la generación de una mentalidad innovadora para crear cambio disruptivo y duradero.

“NEORIS no es un lugar donde individuos simplemente “van a trabajar”; es un ambiente creativo que desafía nuestro pensamiento todos los días junto a colegas que contagian la pasión por innovar. Damos la bienvenida a las distintas perspectivas y el pluralismo que es combustible para nuestras soluciones disruptivas. Es por medio de esta cultura que producimos trabajo de calidad y cultivamos relaciones duraderas”

 Martin Mendez, CEO de NEORIS

Nuestro portafolio se compone de: 

PLATAFORMAS Y SERVICIOS INTEGRALES DE LA APLICACIÓN INTELIGENTE

Para ser líder de industria, es necesario poner la innovación en el centro de las aplicaciones, a través de un camino práctico que requiere tacto y conocimientos técnicos. Combinamos el poder de las plataformas líderes: SAP, Microsoft, Oracle, Salesforce, junto con nuestra inteligencia, innovación, conocimiento profundo de la industria y capacidades de la misma para impulsar una transformación a gran escala que permita el uso de plataformas.

AGILE Y DEVOPS

Agile y DevOps pueden impulsar el valor con una velocidad acelerada hacia el mercado, aumentando la calidad y reduciendo el tiempo y los recursos desperdiciados. Proporcionamos entrenadores de Agile y Scrum Masters altamente experimentados, al igual que recursos de entrega que habilitan a los equipos de alto rendimiento a la tasa de un país cercano.

MODERNIZACIÓN DE LA APLICACIÓN

Ayudamos a las organizaciones a ser más ágiles y eficientes a través de la implementación de aplicaciones actualizadas en los sistemas heredados existentes. También aprovechamos las habilidades rentables y entregadas a nivel mundial que permiten la adopción de la plataforma y la optimización de la aplicación. Aprovechamos nuestro marco de herramientas comprobadas de planificación, evaluación y diagnóstico para permitir a los líderes de TI migrar de sus sistemas existentes al estado futuro deseado, a la vez que minimizamos costos y riesgos.

SMART AMS

En NEORIS entendemos que en el entorno empresarial competitivo, es crucial para las empresas explorar opciones innovadoras para mejorar la eficiencia y productividad de sus operaciones.

En medio de los desafíos de la competencia global y la desaceleración económica, las organizaciones se ven en la necesidad de confiar en socios comerciales para llevar a cabo sus operaciones y buscar nuevas formas de crear valor, a través de productos digitales.

Es por eso que, con nuestros servicios gestionados de aplicaciones e infraestructura, y gracias al exclusivo modelo SMART AMS, podemos garantizar los resultados y la eficiencia necesarios. De esta manera, nuestros clientes pueden enfocarse en sus objetivos de crecimiento, mientras nosotros nos encargamos de sus operaciones de manera eficaz.

¿En esta oportunidad ha recibido el Golden Certifícate después de 10 ciclos de recertificación, esto son 20 años en el programa!, cuéntenos como ha sido este camino?

Ha sido un camino largo y lleno de éxitos, en un principio lo tomamos como un reto para lograr certificar nuestra practica de servicios administrados para SAP. Ya con el reto logrado el camino ha sido lleno de aprendizajes y recomendaciones por parte de SAP que nos ha ayudado a fortalecer y robustecer nuestra práctica y donde hemos logrado incrementar nuestras certificaciones. Nos ha permitido interactuar con auditores de distintas geografías lo que ha enriquecido la experiencia en el proceso de recertificación.

Nuestra práctica nos ha colocado como diferenciadores con nuestros clientes gracias al acompañamiento y respaldo que hemos tenido de SAP en estos 20 años, estamos convencidos que el trabajo en conjunto nos ha llevado a conseguir el éxito y la continuidad Operativa y de proyectos con nuestros clientes.

 ¿Por qué quiso su organización participar en el programa de socios de SAP Certification for Outsourcing Partners?

Creemos firmemente que ser socios de SAP nos ayuda a diferenciar nuestra compañía de la competencia y mantener nuestra práctica certificad por el mismo SAP nos ayuda a brindar una oferta de valor a nuestros clientes, basados en las mejores practicas de industria de SAP. Es un respaldo sólido hacia nuestra práctica que nos permite generar confianza en nuestros clientes.

¿Qué impacto positivo ha tenido la certificación en su oferta de servicios y en las actividades de participación en el mercado?

Nuestra practica de SAP se robustece logrando ser reconocida en el mercado, siendo referentes en la implementación y servicio administrados de SAP.

Al tener las certificaciones de este programa cumplimos con los requisitos de nuestros clientes en RFIs, RFPs, y solicitud de servicios administrados.

¿Como han aportado las certificaciones del programa a mejorar sus procesos de servicio?

Manteniendo nuestra practica vigente y en cumplimiento acorde a las recomendaciones que engloba esta certificación, brindando a nuestros clientes un servicio de calidad y altamente competitivo. 

¿Aplican las recomendaciones que el auditor les proporciona? ¿Considera importante tener una visión externa de sus procesos de prestación de servicios SAP?

 Si, Consideramos importante el cumplimiento de las recomendaciones para la mejora continua de nuestra practica de SAP. Además, para nosotros es importante tener una visión externa para identificar gaps, corregirlos y robustecer nuestra practica de SAP.

¿y cual es la apreciación del programa por parte de sus diferentes involucrados?

El ser socio de la categoría SAP Outsourcing Operations Partner nos ha fortalecido desde la perspectiva de nuestra práctica, metodología y herramientas, así como nos abre puertas con nuestros clientes para demostrar nuestro potencial y la generación de valor. Ha sido una gran experiencia y vamos a continuar por este camino.

Ruben Perez, Global Digital Centers VP

Me toco llevar en varias ocasiones este proceso liderado por Marcos Garcia-Laule y su equipo de auditores y siempre fue un proceso bastante enriquecedor para nuestra oferta, aprendimos de las recomendaciones resultantes del proceso de recertificación, pero, sobre todo; muy satisfactorio darnos cuenta de que NEORIS tiene diferenciales importantes que son reconocidos por el mismo SAP.

Gonzalo Baldit, Global Managed Services Director

El contar con la certificación SAP Outsourcing Operations Partner, es una garantía para nuestros clientes que la operación y continuidad operativa de los diversos proyectos que implementamos sobre SAP puede ser operada por NEORIS con los más altos estándares de calidad y niveles de servicios esperados. Lo cual ayuda a nuestros clientes a enfocarse en los procesos de valor de sus organizaciones y dejar la operación de SAP a NEORIS.

 Jose Angel Flores, México SAP Solutions Director

 Y ahora, saliendo un poco del contexto de esta certificación,  ¿que otros logros recientes ha  obtenido Neoris que impulsen el partnership con SAP?  

Durante el 2023 y por su experiencia y excelencia en soluciones SAP, NEORIS fue nombrado uno de los partner estratégicos por SAP para la generación de valor a través de la Metodología de SAP APPHAUS. Esto nos coloca en un grupo selecto de empresas que proporcionan pruebas de concepto y/o prototipos de rápida adopción sobre tecnología SAP BTP. NEORIS posee el primer APPHAUS de habla hispana en américa latina.

Además, durante este mismo año, y por tercera vez, NEORIS fue nombrado por Microsoft partner del año para la categoría de SAP on AZURE, demostrando nuevamente nuestras capacidades en esta área.

Para obtener información general acerca del programa de certificación de Partners, puede consultarla en el  SAP Outsourcing Operations Partner Guide.  O consulte nuestra colección de  blog posts donde continuamente encontrará novedades y principalmente experiencias de nuestros socios.

Partner Innovation Lifecycle Services (PILS) es un equipo de expertos globales que apoyan a los socios a desarrollar soluciones innovadoras en plataformas y productos SAP para habilitar clientes exitosos. Ofrecemos un conjunto completo de servicios a socios que proporcionan hardware, operaciones de TI y Software. Estos incluyen co-innovación, certificación y servicios técnicos para ayudar a los clientes a transformar sus negocios y administrar empresas inteligentes.

Para conocer mas información acerca de los requisitos para la certificación, por favor consulte nuestra presentación.

Visite el SAP Partner Program: https://www.sap.com/partners/partner-program.html

Visite PILS en PartnerEdge: https://partneredge.sap.com/en/partnership/services/co-innovation.html

entry.title: Re: SEN. Context administration in the desktop assistant V2
entry.content: Hi Shane, the first page key is a "default" - before neutralising. the second one is a result of neutralising. I've got the second one after using the preset and reg exp (the same page key). But it works well only in case I use reg exp. In case I use preset it works only with the original order number

entry.title: How to maintain web gui link with the direct t-code in Advanced Financial Closing
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

How do we maintain a web gui link with the specific t-code in SAP Advanced Financial Closing. 

I am able to create a task having "Web Application" type and there I have given the Web GUI link but it is not opening the specific t-code.

Do I have to open the Web link everytime and enter the T-code manually to perform the task or the task can be created specifically for a particular T-code?

@sunilrajashekar @Maximilian1 

Regards,

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content: Good morning.  I am from Tasmania, Australia.  I have only just commenced a role as a HR Business Lead to implement SAP.

entry.title: Re: Asset Management in Success Factors
entry.content: Thank you, Mary

entry.title: Re: Run Automatic Payment F110: Automatic Cash discount a...
entry.content:
Eli has a response here: https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/in-table-t030r-the-entry-ske-is-missing/qaq-p/6057749

"Go to FBKP, choose 'Automatic postings' and maintain accounts determination for 'Cash discount and payment differences'."

entry.title: S/4HANA 2023 DEMO21 - if we missed January will there be another session in 2024?
entry.content: If we missed the January DEMO21 program, will there be a 2nd release in 2024?  What would be the estimated timing for this?

entry.title: Re: Fiori
entry.content: Hello Sanil Bhandari thanks for your answer, and i have on more question

entry.title: Re: Fiori
entry.content: Hello Sanil Bhandari thanks for your answer, and i have on more question, why did you mention Fiori cloud? is SAP fiori integrated with Fiori cloud?

entry.title: Log off button
entry.content:
Hi

Our App preview is causing multiple sessions in S4 backend

Has someone been able to implement Log off button in Build apps

Regards

Manish

entry.title: Multiple backend sessions
entry.content:
We are facing an issue with Build apps connectivtiy to S4 backend

  1. Lauch a Build app in preview
  2. Look at the Data in browser session
  3. 7 Backend S4 sessions are opened for one App Preview?
  4. Close the browser, the Backend sessions are not released?

Has someone been able to resolve the Multiple backend sessions issue

Regards

MB

entry.title: Re: Compensation Tiles - Bringing Analytics To Life!
entry.content:
Is there a possibility in the future to bring Story reports into the Insights config? Since Tiles are being phased out this would fill the gap. Or better still - extend the life of Tiles & Dashboards for a few more years.
Maybe worth creating an SAP Influence ticket 🙂

entry.title: How to configure and active HTTPS/SSL on the SAP Solution Manager system?
entry.content:
It's requested that HTTPS must be configured on the Solution Manager system so that all URLS operate on the HTTPS port 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to configure and active HTTPS/SSL on the SAP Solu...
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

It's necessary to configure SSL well on both the solman ABAP and JAVA system first, following the same steps to configure SSL on Netweaver ABAP and JAVA. If the SAP Web Dispatcher is used for load balancing, configure it as well. 

Configure ABAP SSL 
Transport Layer Security on the AS ABAP
2970934 - How to create the CSR and how to import the certificate response for ABAP system

Configure JAVA SSL 
Configuring Transport Layer Security on SAP NetWeaver AS for Java
1770585 - How to configure SSL on the AS Java

Configure Web Dispatcher
Configure SAP Web Dispatcher to Support SSL

After SSL is configured and HTTPS URLs are directly accessible in the browser, please update them in transaction SOLMAN_SETUP->Infrastructure Preparation->Step "Define HTTP Connectivity", and execute all steps in "Enable Connectivity".

Best regards,
Vera Jiang

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Integration B2B Sender Process Direct
entry.content:
I was able to fix the issue after adding header - SAP_COM_SND_If_Message_Header in custom IFlow.

BR,

Rashmi
